name: Pin Point Indoor Pickleball & Golf
address: 2201 S Wilmington St Suite 145, Raleigh, NC 27603
about: Pin Point Indoor Pickleball & Golf is a multi-sport facility featuring indoor golf simulators and pickleball courts in Raleigh, NC, and North Myrtle Beach, SC. The venues offer state-of-the-art Trackman simulators, short game areas, full-service bars and restaurants, and spaces for private or corporate events. They cater to casual players, serious athletes, and groups looking for a combined golf and pickleball experience with amenities like coaching, leagues, tournaments, and event hosting.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge Trackman simulators provide accurate data for skill improvement
Full short game areas allow for comprehensive practice beyond just driving
On-site coaching and lesson options help players refine their technique
App-based booking system simplifies scheduling sessions and reservations
Multi-sport environment offers flexibility and variety for golfers

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with crowd-pleasing food at reasonable prices to fuel your play
Full-service bar and restaurant with a wide selection of drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar-based launch monitor with full ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility provides club rentals, but you can bring your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue offers a full-service kitchen and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on simulator usage and play style, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Pin Point is family-friendly with amenities and programming suitable for juniors and youth.
